mapper.insert: INSERT INTO rs_task ( task_code, image_id, task_type, task_name, status, priority, progress, retry_count, max_retry_count, params ) VALUES ( #{taskCode}, #{imageId}, #{taskType}, #{taskName}, #{status}, #{priority}, #{progress}, #{retryCount}, #{maxRetryCount}, CAST(NULLIF(#{params}, '') AS jsonb) )
mapper.update: UPDATE rs_task SET output_bucket = #{outputBucket}, output_object_key = #{outputObjectKey}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE rs_task SET status = #{status}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE rs_task SET status = 'FAILED', error_message = #{errorMessage}, retry_count = max_retry_count, finished_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
